buildCommand: cd frontend && npm install && npm run build

headers.value: default-src 'self'; script-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' 'unsafe-eval' https://js.sentry.io; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' https://fonts.googleapis.com; font-src 'self' https://fonts.gstatic.com; img-src 'self' data: blob: https:; connect-src 'self' https://app.stratumai.app wss://app.stratumai.app https://sentry.io; frame-ancestors 'none'; base-uri 'self'; form-action 'self';
